resources.string: Faɗa wa masu saye game da kanka…
Ba a iya loda asusu ba
Ba a iya ajiye canje-canje ba
Kai ga masu saye kuma sayar da kayanka a Mochi. Ana sarrafa biyan kuɗi cikin aminci ta Stripe.
Ƙirƙiri bayanin mai sayarwa don fara jera kaya
Haɗa asusun Stripe don karɓar biyan kuɗi daga masu saye
Mochi yana ɗaukar %1$s%% na kowane sayarwa.
Stripe yana caza kuɗin sarrafa nasa kan kowane mu’amala da kuma kuɗi tsayayye kan kowane mayar da kuɗi. Ana lissafa farashin yanzu na kuɗinka da yankinka a cikin Dashboard ɗin Stripe naka.
Za mu ɗaga bidinka ta atomatik da ƙaramin adadin da ake buƙata don ci gaba da kasancewa a gaba, har zuwa wannan iyakar.
An tabbatar da siye — kammala biyan kuɗi
Tayin mafi girma dole ya zama aƙalla yawan tayin ka
An sanya bidinka amma nan da nan an wuce shi. Wani mai bidi yana da iyaka mafi girma. Bidinsa yanzu shine %1$s.
Ba a ba da izinin debit ba
Product ba a yarda da shi ba
Caji da ba a sani ba
Ba za a iya fara checkout na biyan kuɗi ba — mai sayarwa bai gama saitin biyan kuɗi ba
Shigar da ƙasarka don ganin zaɓuɓɓukan jigilar kaya
Choose which marketplace events send you notifications. Disabled topics are still recorded in your inbox.
Suspension, ban, and reactivation notices for your account.
Capability and payout changes on your connected Stripe account.
An auction you bid on has been cancelled.
An auction you bid on or watched has closed.
Another bidder has placed a higher bid than yours.
A new bid was placed on one of your auctions.
Decisions on listings you posted or appealed.
New messages from buyers or sellers in your threads.
Shipping, delivery, dispute, and refund updates on orders you placed.
New orders, dispute openings, and refund requests on items you sell.
Updates on reports you have filed.
Notices when a report names you as the target.
New reviews written about you by buyers or sellers.
Replies to reviews you have written.
Billing, pause, and cancellation events on subscriptions you bought.
Billing, pause, and cancellation events on subscriptions you sell.
Activate your account to start buying and selling.
An ɓoye har sai mai sayarwa ya yi maka review, ko bayan kwanaki 14.
Taimaka wa masu siye nan gaba — raba yadda wannan odar ta tafi.
Ba da dalili don buƙatar mayar da kuɗinka.
Ba kamar yadda aka bayyana ba
Ba a ba da izini ba
An gaza alamta a matsayin an aika
An yi alama a matsayin an aika
Wannan zai soke biyan kuɗinka. Za ka rasa damar shiga a ƙarshen lokacin biyan ka na yanzu.
Subscriptions sayayya ce mai maimaitawa — masu sayarwa suna jera su tare da farashin wata-wata ko shekara-shekara.
Wasu ayyuka, gami da ƙirƙirar sabbin tallace-tallace da kammala odoji, an taƙaita yayin da asusunku ke cikin wannan yanayin.
Ba a iya sabunta matsayin Stripe ba
Ba a iya yin tayi ba
Shigar da adadi mafi girma daga tayin yanzu
Babu mai bincike da ya samu don buɗe shafin biya
Wannan zai goge tallan har abada.
Ba a iya loda hoto ba
A ƙasa da mafi ƙanƙantar Stripe (%1$s)
Haɗa asusun Stripe don karɓar biya kan wannan tallan.
Gwada gyara ko share matatun ka.
Kuɗin dandali: %1$s%%. Duba dashboard ɗin Stripe ɗin ka don kuɗin sarrafawa.
Ba a iya kididdige kuɗi ba
Adadi a cikakkun kuɗi. Kasuwa tana tace ta amfani da kuɗin tallan kanta.
Ba a iya sake bayar da tallan ba
An hana mai siyarwa. Ba za a iya yin sabbin odoji ba.
An dakatar da mai siyarwa. Sabbin odoji sun tsaya har sai an mayar da asusun.
An kashe siye yayin da asusun mai siyarwa ke ƙarƙashin taƙaitawa.
Wannan yana cire daftari daga asusunka har abada.
Latsa Sabon talla don ƙirƙirar abun farko.
Lokacin da kuka aika saƙo zuwa ga mai siyarwa (ko mai siye ya aiko muku saƙo) zaren zai bayyana a nan.
Ba a iya loda zaren ba
Ba a iya aika saƙo ba
Ba a iya loda bayanan martaba ba
Bankin ku ya gabatar da koken mayar da kuɗi kan wannan oda. Stripe na sarrafa takaddamar tare da mai sayarwa; sakamakon zai bayyana a nan idan an yanke shawara.
Bar shi babu komai don mayar da duka odar.
Masu siye da masu sayarwa za su iya bita juna bayan an kammala oda.
Buɗe odar da aka kammala don barin bita.
Ba ku rubuta wani bita ba tukuna
Ba a iya loda bita ba
Ba a iya aika amsa ba
Dalilin mayar da kuɗi na Stripe: %1$s
Ana nuna kuɗin sarrafawa na Stripe a dashboard ɗinku na Stripe.
Kuna iya amsawa sau ɗaya kawai. Amsoshin jama\'a ne.
Odoji daga jerin sunayenku da aka buga suna fitowa nan.
Danna alamar bookmark a kowace jeri don ajiye shi don gaba.
Babu jerin sunayen da aka ajiye
Kammala saitin Stripe ɗinku kafin ku iya karɓar biya.
Ba a iya buɗe Stripe ba
Masu biyan kuɗi zuwa jerin sunayenku suna fitowa nan.
Yana cika kai tsaye a biyan kuɗi na gaba idan an ƙara haɗin biyan kuɗi.
Ana amfani da shi don takardun biya da bin dokar haraji. Ba a nuna shi a bayananka na jama\'a.
Haɗa Stripe don fara jera kayayyaki da karbar biya.
Saitin mai sayarwa bai cika ba
Ƙirƙiri asusun mai sayarwa don jera kayayyaki da kaiwa ga masu saye.
Ƙarin sarrafa asusun mai sayarwa zai bayyana a nan idan sun samu.
Kunna asusun mai sayarwa da farko
Ƙirƙiri bayananka na mai sayarwa kafin haɗa biyan kuɗi.
Saitin mai sayarwa naka ya cika. Kana iya sarrafa Stripe ko duba sabon matsayin asusunka a nan.
Ƙirƙiri bayanan martabar mai sayarwa don fara jera kayayyaki
Haɗa asusun Stripe don karɓar biyan kuɗi daga masu saye
Stripe yana buƙatar ƙarin bayani kafin ka karɓi biyan kuɗi. Cika buƙatun a kan Stripe Dashboard ɗinka, sannan danna Duba matsayi.
Ba a iya buɗe Stripe ba
